rag_rules: Repair broken AGREE references by ensuring all identifiers in contracts correspond to visible AADL features or valid helpers declared in the same annex.
generic_rules: Prioritize resolving root unresolved references before modifying contract logic.
Use only scalar types int, real, and bool in AGREE declarations; avoid model-specific type names.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must resolve to typed entities; invalid references cause 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors.
Implementation-level bindings require subcomponents and connections to be declared before use in annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix unresolved references; remove or correct the invalid clause instead.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or property references not present in the original model or its dependencies.
